# CWE-41 negative: canonical path checked under root
lang: go
file: CWE-41-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-41 Improper Resolution of Path Equivalence (mitigated)
func ReadSharedNote(c *gin.Context) {
	root := "/srv/notes"
	rel := c.Query("path")
	full, err := filepath.Abs(filepath.Join(root, rel))
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "bad path"})
		return
	}
	rootAbs, err := filepath.Abs(root)
	if err != nil || !strings.HasPrefix(full, rootAbs+string(os.PathSeparator)) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "bad path"})
		return
	}
	body, err := os.ReadFile(full)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "missing"})
		return
	}
	c.String(http.StatusOK, string(body))
}
